title: wedelia calycina var. acuminata
intro: Wedelia calycina var. acuminata is a variety of the Wedelia calycina plant, also known as the Mexican daisy or tropical daisy, which is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin infections, and other health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia calycina var. acuminata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as diabetes and high blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied topically to the affected area.
